plan.failureSummary: The test failed because the URL remained 'https://www.checklyhq.com/' instead of navigating to 'https://www.checklyhq.com/docs/' after the page.ai step. Tool logs show a click with suspicious negative coordinates (-247px), suggesting the cached interaction logic is stale.
observedIndicators: URL did not change after successful click tool execution

remediationSteps.details: Set clearPageAiCache to true and retry the test to allow the agent to re-analyze the current Checkly homepage and menu structure.
If the failure persists after a cache clear, add a 'waitForURL' or a 'page.waitForNavigation' after the page.ai call to ensure the redirect completes before the assertion.

remediationSteps.summary: Refine AI instructions for menu interaction
remediationSteps.details: If the menu interaction is flaky, provide a more specific instruction to the AI, such as 'Hover over Resources and wait for the dropdown to appear before clicking Documentation'.

plan.notes: The tool call for the 'Documentation' link reported success but used a negative Y-coordinate (240px, -247px), which typically indicates an element that is off-screen or a coordinate mismatch from a stale cache. Since the AI objective was marked complete but the URL didn't change, the deterministic cache is likely pointing to an outdated UI structure.
